title: Additional UBO document uploaded
description: The advisor uploads an updated beneficial owner register for Aurora Atlas Capital.

title: AI entity agent classifies structure
description: The AI agent resolves the entity structure and extracts the final controller hierarchy.

title: QC guard flags address mismatch
description: The QC rules engine detects a mismatch between the operating address and the tax certificate.

payload.failedRule: Operating address corroborated across two documents

title: Advisor resolves exception with fresh evidence
description: Relationship coverage attaches a new address verification source and clears the exception.

title: Continuous KYC alert triggered in London
description: Continuous monitoring detects adverse media tied to a newly disclosed subsidiary controller.

title: Governance console logs explainable decision
description: The system records the reasoning chain, evidence, and reviewer outcome for audit readiness.

title: Meridian uploads refreshed source-of-wealth packet
description: An updated source-of-wealth package lands for Meridian Commodities Group with new controller evidence.

title: Meridian ownership graph reclassified
description: The entity-resolution agent recalculates Meridian's trust structure and reduces residual uncertainty.

title: Meridian exception cleared after analyst review
description: The analyst validates the refreshed evidence and clears the aging source-of-wealth exception.

payload.resolutionRationale: Analyst validated the refreshed source-of-wealth package and approved the case for monitoring.

title: Polaris watchlist delta spikes in Sao Paulo
description: Continuous monitoring detects a material watchlist delta tied to a logistics counterparty in Sao Paulo.

title: Polaris escalation package logged for governance
description: The governance console captures the Polaris watchlist rationale, analyst notes, and linked evidence.

title: Orion adds annual registry refresh
description: A scheduled registry refresh arrives for Orion Maritime Finance and triggers a lightweight review cycle.

title: Orion benchmark case reconfirmed by AI
description: The benchmark straight-through case is reclassified to confirm the controller graph still matches the registry.

title: Orion benchmark audit snapshot preserved
description: The platform archives Orion's straight-through reasoning pack as a benchmark for audit and control review.
